name: renderlab
description: React / Next.js / TanStack Start 렌더링 전략 학습 랩 — as-is/to-be 쌍 데모 + 단계별 성능 계측

scripts.setup: npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix apps/next-lab install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix apps/start-lab install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix apps/react-lab install --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n next,start,react -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix apps/next-lab run dev" "npm --prefix apps/start-lab run dev" "npm --prefix apps/react-lab run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/next-lab run build && npm --prefix apps/start-lab run build && npm --prefix apps/react-lab run build
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n next,start,react -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix apps/next-lab run start" "npm --prefix apps/start-lab run start" "npm --prefix apps/react-lab run start"
scripts.demo: npm run build && npm run start
